basic_details.job_title: Annamalai University Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Annamalai University has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification has been published on the official Annamalai University website. Candidates below 30 years of age holding a first-class M.Sc. or M.Phil. in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, or Life Sciences from a recognized university can submit their applications through email on or before 16 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: First class in M.Sc. or M. Phil., in Biochemistry / Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Life Sciences from recognized University.
qualification.details: Project Assistant - 1: First class in M.Sc. or M. Phil., in Biochemistry / Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Life Sciences from recognized University. Prior experience in cell culture studies and animal handling techniques will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Annamalai University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Job 2026 Notification PDF

Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant - 1: First class in M.Sc. or M. Phil., in Biochemistry / Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Life Sciences from recognized University. Prior experience in cell culture studies and animal handling techniques will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Age Limit 2026
Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Important Dates 2026
Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant 1 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant - 1 position at Annamalai University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant - 1 position is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant - 1 role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a First class in M.Sc. or M. Phil., in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, or Life Sciences from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any preference for candidates with prior experience?
faq.answer: Yes, prior experience in cell culture studies and animal handling techniques will be preferred for the Project Assistant - 1 position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Project Assistant - 1 position is below 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant - 1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the post applied for is clearly mentioned in the subject line.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant - 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant - 1 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant - 1 position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMRG/eOffice E-671131/052.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Annamalai University located?
faq.answer: Annamalai University is located in Annamalainagar, Tamil Nadu.
